message:
test(extras): add doom palette + WAD coverage tests (bd-3b5al)

Add targeted tests to push palette.rs and wad.rs above the 60% crate
threshold (previously 58.23% and 58.76% respectively).

palette.rs: edge cases for light calculations, colormap level
generation, channel independence in wall_color.

wad.rs: missing lump error paths (parse_colormap), multiple-entry
parsing for all lump types (linedefs/sectors/segs/subsectors/nodes/
things/sidedefs), empty lump handling, partial data truncation,
DirEntry name_str edge cases, find_lump_after bounds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
